title: is the incense a "lid" or "cover" (circa atonement) that is to cover/hide Yah's face / cavod, nakedness ? uncovering God's nakedness? a  compound that doesn't keep God covered visually? Trying to see / look on Yahweh's nakedness?
body:
# לְכַסּוֹת בְּשַׂר עֶרְוָה
-  circa Ezekiel 8:2 Ezekiel 8:2 LEB and I saw, and look! A figure like the appearance of a man; from the appearance of his waist and below was fire, and from his waist and upward was like the appearance of brightness, like the outward appearance of amber.  Ezekiel 8:2 HB2 8:2 וָאֶרְאֶה וְהִנֵּה דְמוּת כְּמַרְאֵה אִישׁ מִמַּרְאֵה מָתְנָיו וּלְמַטָּה אֵשׁ וּמִמָּתְנָיו וּלְמַעְלָה כְּמַרְאֵה־זֹהַר כְּעֵין הַחַשְׁמַלָה:
- Exodus 20:26 LEB You will not go up with steps onto my altar, that your nakedness not be exposed on it.’Exodus 20:26 HB2 20:26 וְלֹא־תַעֲלֶה בְמַעֲלֹת עַל־מִזְבְּחִי אֲשֶׁר לֹא־תִגָּלֶה עֶרְוָתְךָ עָלָיו:
- Exodus 28:42 LEB And make for them undergarments of linen to cover naked flesh; they will be from loins to thigh.Exodus 28:42 HB2 28:42 וַעֲשֵׂה לָהֶם מִכְנְסֵי־בָד לְכַסּוֹת בְּשַׂר עֶרְוָה מִמָּתְנַיִם וְעַד־יְרֵכַיִם יִהְיוּ:
-
